title: Curved surface area of a cylinder
problem: Find the curved surface area of a cylinder with radius $6 \text{ cm}$ and height $8 \text{ cm}$. Round your answer to 2 decimal places.

steps.instruction: Write the formula for curved surface area.

title: Total surface area of a closed cylinder
problem: Find the total surface area of a closed cylinder with radius $5 \text{ cm}$ and height $10 \text{ cm}$. Round your answer to 2 decimal places.

steps.instruction: Write the formula for total surface area of a closed cylinder. A closed cylinder has a curved surface and two circular ends.
Calculate the total area of the two circular ends.
Add the two parts and evaluate.

title: Surface area of an open cylindrical tin
problem: A cylindrical tin has no lid. Its radius is $6 \text{ cm}$ and its height is $10 \text{ cm}$. Find the total surface area of material needed to make the tin. Round your answer to 2 decimal places.

steps.instruction: Identify which faces the tin has. Since there is no lid, the tin has a curved surface and one circular base only.
Calculate the area of the single circular base.
Add the two areas and evaluate.
